name: swarmdo-ponytail
description: Ponytail for swarmdo — makes agents think like the laziest senior dev in the room: YAGNI, stdlib before dependencies, one line before fifty. Intensity levels lite/full/ultra plus audit, review, debt, and gain sub-skills. Vendored from DietrichGebert/ponytail (MIT).
author: swarmdo (vendored from DietrichGebert/ponytail, MIT)
